name: FusionAuth
description: FusionAuth is a self-hostable identity and access management platform. It provides APIs for user registration, login, JWT management, multi-factor authentication, application configuration, and tenant management for multi-tenant deployments.

auth.note: Pass your API key directly in the Authorization header without a prefix.

capabilities.name: create_user
capabilities.description: Create a new user in FusionAuth. Optionally register them to an application in the same request.

capabilities.name: login_user
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user with email/username and password. Returns a JWT access token and refresh token on success.

capabilities.name: register_user
capabilities.description: Register an existing user to an application. This associates the user with an app and assigns roles.

capabilities.name: retrieve_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's profile by ID, email, or username. Returns full user data including registrations and group memberships.

capabilities.name: validate_jwt
capabilities.description: Validate a JWT access token and return its claims. Useful for verifying tokens without a local public key.

capabilities.name: create_application
capabilities.description: Create a new application (client) in FusionAuth with OAuth settings, roles, and authentication policies.

capabilities.name: start_passwordless_login
capabilities.description: Initiate a passwordless login flow by sending a magic link or one-time code to the user's email.

capabilities.name: issue_refresh_token
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new JWT access token. Supports token rotation for security.
